description:
Assess the impact of air density on wind turbine performance using the HAWT BEM Simulation module. Run a simulation named 'Sim_SeaLevel' with an air density of 1.225 kg/m^3 and a second simulation named 'Sim_HighAlt' with an air density of 0.900 kg/m^3. Save the project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/altitude_study.wpa. Create a report at /home/ga/Documents/projects/altitude_report.txt comparing the Maximum Power (kW) of both simulations using the following format:
Sea Level Max Power: [Value] kW
High Altitude Max Power: [Value] kW
Ratio: [Value]
